chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6305 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.28109/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2025 Ms. Nasima Mangrio, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate files Vakalatnama of Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate on behalf of the respondent, which is taken on record. In this matter Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate places on record a show cause notice which has already been issued to the petitioner. Petitioner’s counsel states that reply has been filed and the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority. Petitioner’s counsel seeks directions for issuing authority to adjudicate the notice vide a speaking order, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. She further seeks that pending adjudication as aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the department has no cavil to the aforesaid and submits that the petition may be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
